children.name: vrrpAssoIpAddrTable
children.description: The table of addresses associated with this virtual router.

children.name: vrrpTrapAuthErrorType
children.description:
Potential types of configuration conflicts.
            Used by vrrpAuthFailure trap.

children.name: vrrpTrapPacketSrc
children.description:
The IP address of an inbound VRRP packet. Used by
             vrrpTrapAuthFailure trap.

children.name: vrrpOperTable
children.description:
Operations table for a VRRP router which consists of a
             sequence (i.e., one or more conceptual rows) of
             'vrrpOperEntry' items.

children.name: vrrpNotificationCntl
children.description:
Indicates whether the VRRP-enabled router will generate
            SNMP traps for events defined in this MIB. 'Enabled'
            results in SNMP traps; 'disabled', no traps are sent.

children.name: vrrpRouterChecksumErrors
children.description:
The total number of VRRP packets received with an invalid
            VRRP checksum value.

children.name: vrrpRouterVersionErrors
children.description:
The total number of VRRP packets received with an unknown
            or unsupported version number.

children.name: vrrpRouterVrIdErrors
children.description:
The total number of VRRP packets received with an invalid
            VRID for this virtual router.
